Title: Enma-sama mo bikkuri Ano yo de faito
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Hiromi Tsuru, Mayumi Tanaka
Plot: Son Goku's friends form a plan to bring him back to life with the Dragon Balls, and Piccolo takes Gohan away to train him in preparation for the arrival of the two Saiya-jin. Meanwhile, Kami-Sama meets Goku in the Other World and ...
